# Regex fixtures for skill: alert-hygiene
# Format: one directive per non-empty, non-comment line.
#   MATCH: <prompt>     — regex from config/default-triggers.json for this skill must match
#   NO_MATCH: <prompt>  — regex must NOT match
# Tested deterministically by tests/test-regex-fixtures.sh (zero LLM cost).
# These cover routing (regex), not description quality (see skills/alert-hygiene/evals/evals.json).

MATCH: our alerts are flapping and pager is noisy, help tune thresholds
MATCH: review alert policies for fatigue and suppress the worst offenders
MATCH: incident volume is too high this sprint, we need to dedup notifications
MATCH: please audit alert hygiene across this project
MATCH: redesign our SLO burn rate alerts for billing

NO_MATCH: pods are crashlooping investigate now
NO_MATCH: write me a python script to rename files
NO_MATCH: open a PR to bump the helm chart version
NO_MATCH: design an SLO from scratch for the payment service
NO_MATCH: investigate the production outage from last night
